wiki.summary: "Promoting Violence" (also dubbed as "smoke / i got smoke" by fans) was first teased alongside "Million Dollar Mansion" on 3/18/26 with the caption "New swag 4U p*ssies bite me :)" it would soon officially release on 3/27/26 on all streaming services, on soundcloud this serves as track 2 for his ep "Fully Loaded". The beat consists of a eerie, trance-like synth loop with hard hitting 808s produced by Rokonthetrack. On this track che raps about his lavish lifestyle Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: "Promoting Violence" (also dubbed as "smoke / i got smoke" by fans) was first teased alongside "Million Dollar Mansion" on 3/18/26 with the caption "New swag 4U p*ssies bite me :)" it would soon officially release on 3/27/26 on all streaming services, on soundcloud this serves as track 2 for his ep "Fully Loaded". The beat consists of a eerie, trance-like synth loop with hard hitting 808s produced by Rokonthetrack. On this track che raps about his lavish lifestyle, beef with opps (possibly dissing bleood and bruce in "Promoting Violence") drugs, and women making this a very aggressive and energized track. #restinbassisnotover Read more on Last.fm.
